references.text: Petchsri, S, S Zungsontiporn & T Boonkerd. 2021. Taxonomic note on the genus Marsilea (Marsileaceae) in Thailand. Fern Gazette 21: 278-289.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 31 August 2024

species.citation: C.Presl , Reliq. Haenk. 1 (1825) 84; Type: from Borneo.
species.distribution: Australia, Borneo, ?China, ?Malay Peninsula, New Guinea, Philippines, Vietnam. LUBANG, LUZON: Bataan, Laguna, Mountain Province, NCR, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Davao, Davao del Sur, MINDORO.
species.notes: Petchsri et al. (2021) consider Marsilea crenata a synonym of Marsilea minuta.

species.citation: L. , Mant. Pl. Altera (1771) 308 ; Petchsri et al., Fern Gaz. (2020) 281; Type: from India.
species.distribution: Afghanistan, Africa, Andaman Isls, Australia, Bangladesh, Bhutan, Cambodia, China, Europe, India, Indian Ocean, Japan, Java, Laos, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Middle East, Myanmar, Nepal, New Guinea, Pakistan, Philippines, Ryukyu Isls, Sri Lanka, Sulawesi, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam. LUZON: NCR, Sorsogon.
China, Europe, Japan, Korea, Mongolia, W Asia.
species.notes: Reported for the Philippines by Moody (1989) as a weed in rice, but no specimens cited.
